commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is queued because there is no current blocking code finding; the remaining action is maintainer/proof review and canonical choice among duplicate Bun launcher PRs.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern found; the diff only changes launcher error classification and focused tests, with no dependency, workflow, secret, or publishing changes. (sha=41b07bb21f83a71a73573fffa5272dd14755ef6b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `openclaw.mjs` to recognize Bun raw-specifier module-miss messages for optional launcher imports and adds launcher e2e probes for direct, coded direct, transitive, and non-module miss behavior.

PR surface: Tests +66, Other +9. Total +75 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source and linked live report, though I did not run Bun locally. Current main rejects Bun raw-specifier misses before matching the optional import, while the linked issue reports the exact Bun 1.3.x startup failure on the latest release line.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is queued because there is no current blocking code finding; the remaining action is maintainer/proof review and canonical choice among duplicate Bun launcher PRs.

target.title: fix(cli): handle Bun optional import misses
target.body:
Fixes #86198

## Summary
- Recognize Bun-style direct module-miss messages in the launcher optional-import guard.
- Keep Node direct misses supported through `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND`, URL, and absolute-path checks.
- Preserve the transitive-miss behavior so missing dependencies from `dist/entry.js` are still surfaced instead of being treated as missing OpenClaw build output.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 23 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check openclaw.mjs test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json openclaw.mjs test/openclaw-launcher.e2e.test.ts`

Note: commit is SSH-signed locally and verified with `git log --show-signature -1` after rebasing onto current `main`.
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
